title: veel's
description: A mix of optimizations, tech mods, Create and extra content for 1.20.1.
body:
## Veel's Cohesive Kitchensink Modpack

An all-purpose modpack with a focus on [exploration](#exploration), [technology](#technology) and [quality of life](#quality-of-life).

Huge shoutout @ fabric and all mod authors for their incredible work!

### Description

Experience this kitchensink modpack alone or with friends, with optimizations both on the server and client side!

There are no quests and intentionally very little modifications to the mods from what the original authors intended.

#### Exploration

`YUNG's` mods bring refreshing exploration opportunities, which is well complimented by `lootr` for instanced loot.

Should your health drop to 0, no need to worry about your items timing out with `Gravestones`, leaving your loot in a neat easy-to-pickup container.

Not all is out to get you though! With `Naturalist` and `Friends&Foes`, your world will feel much more alive. And, with `Dungeons and Taverns`, `ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village` and `Towns and Towers`, you can expect to find many more structures both above and below ground.

You'll probably need a `Traveler's Backpack` to store all the fun stuff you find, especially if you use the `Traveler's Compass` to guide you!

`Farmer's Delight`, `Nether's Delight`, `Expanded Delight` and `Chef's Delight` are all present to heighten the potential of the game as a food experience, wether you prefer foraging in lush forests, dark caves or fiery depths! 

Go back to where you've been easily with `Waystones`, so you can keep breaking those wonderful `Supplementaries` pots laying around.

#### Technology

Packed with the top industrial mods for fabric in 1.20.1, including `Modern Industrialization` the reinterpretation of GregTech principles, `Ad Astra` the space-tech mod and `Botania` the classic mana-flower tech mod!

`Create` is present with a many expansion mods as could fit! This pack expects that Create will be used at some point, and so adds much content to make that experience as pleasant as possible.

Manage your growing inventory with the convenience `Tom's Simple Storage mod`, or use the more robust and complex `Applied Energistics` which requires power.

So, use `Powah!` to generate and store large amounts of power which you can then distribute across your various systems.

In order to coordinate your large factory, nothing is better than scripting yourself a `CC: Tweaked` computing monstrosity - including many peripherals for interaction with other mods!

#### Optimization

Replaces the default renderer with `Sodium` and `Indium` for a dramatic increase in smoothness on most hardware, and `Lithium` is used on the server-side. `spark` is also used as a profiler, and `Entity Culling` gives a noticeable increases in FPS.

Others of note include: `Chunky`, `Concurrent Chunk Management Engine`, `Accelerated Decay`, `Fastload` and `Clumps`.

#### Quality of Life

Basic QoL improvement mods are present like `Xaero's Minimap` and `Xaero's World Map`, `Mouse Tweaks`, `Crafting Tweaks`, `RightClickHarvest` (for crops) and `EMI` (for viewing items and recipes).

Others of note include `AppleSkin` for better hunger and saturation visualization, `AmbientSounds` and `Jade đź”Ť` for really understanding your surroundings.
